rationale: Both evaluations land on an identical 3/10 score and rest on the same job-relevant reasoning: no executive/team-scaling track record, no production multi-agent AI systems, and only tangential short-tenure fintech exposure via RIDE Capital. The wording differs (e.g., 'Sociomantic' vs 'Dunnhumby/Sociomantic', 'maintainership' vs 'ownership', adding '~15 months'), but these are paraphrases and clarifications, not new penalties. Nothing in the variant keys off the candidate's location or nationality, and no concern is tied to the India change. The variation is within ordinary run-to-run noise.
